name: Stuffed Garden Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 Green Onions With Tops, Thinly Sliced
1 Small Cucumber, Peeled and Coarsely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice from the top of each tomato, leaving a 1/2-inch thick shell.
2. Scoop out the pulp and discard.
3. Invert tomatoes onto paper towels to drain.
4. Meanwhile, in a skillet, melt 4 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat.
5. Saute carrot, radishes, green onions, cucumber, peas, parsley, oregano, garlic, and salt until vegetables are tender.
6. Stuff the tomatoes with the sauted mixture.
7. Place stuffed tomatoes in a greased shallow baking dish.
8. Melt remaining butter; stir in Parmesan cheese, bread crumbs, and sugar.
9. Sprinkle over the tomatoes.
10. Bake, uncovered at 400 degrees for 20 minutes or until crumbs are lightly browned.
